# Luzo AI

> Luzo AI turns your business into a week of scroll-stopping social content ideas — captions, hooks, and video concepts across every platform.

Luzo AI is a SaaS tool for creators, founders, and agencies. Users add their business info once, then generate full weekly social media content plans in seconds.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product overview and how it works
- [Pricing](/pricing): Starter, Pro, and Studio plans
